prTitle: feat: implement temperature conversion utilities with tests
prBody:
## Summary

- Adds `what-s-the-temp/src/utils/temperature.ts` with three pure utility functions:
  - `toFahrenheit(celsius)` — converts using `(c * 9/5) + 32`
  - `toCelsius(fahrenheit)` — converts using `(f - 32) * 5/9`
  - `formatTemp(celsius, unit)` — returns a rounded display string e.g. `"26°C"` or `"79°F"`
- Adds `what-s-the-temp/src/utils/temperature.test.ts` with 25 unit tests covering:
  - Known conversion values (0°C↔32°F, 100°C↔212°F, −40°C↔−40°F)
  - Round-trip inverse-operation precision (< 0.01° error) for several representative values
  - `formatTemp` rounding, unit symbol, negative values, and 0°C/32°F boundary

All 26 tests in the suite pass (25 new + 1 pre-existing App smoke test).

Closes #357
